description: Collaboration activity events and in-app notification contract. Design doc: docs/backend/collaboration-notification-design.md

activity_events.purpose: Append-only facts emitted by collaboration actions.

sync_policy.v1_rule: Daily report feedback activity is local_only and must not enter extranet/intranet sync feed.

notifications.purpose: Per-user local in-app inbox generated from activity events.
notifications.sync_rule: Notifications are local user inbox records and are never synchronized across deployment instances.

notification_preferences.purpose: Per-user event-level notification switches scoped to a workspace.
notification_preferences.default_rule: Missing preference rows mean in_app_enabled=true and email_enabled=false.
notification_preferences.v1_rule: Only in_app_enabled affects notification generation. email_enabled is stored as a reserved field until email delivery exists.

object_watchers.purpose: Per-user local subscriptions to supported collaboration objects.
object_watchers.sync_rule: Object watchers are local user subscriptions and are never synchronized across deployment instances.

planned_event_types.status: design_final_pending_implementation (2026-07-07); move into implemented_event_types_v1.ingestion_operations, notification_generation_rules_v1 and preference_filtering_v1 when pipeline run-level auto-retry ships (docs/backend/pipeline-jobs-design.md section 6.2)
planned_event_types.rule: Emitted once per daily pipeline retry chain when run-level auto-retry attempts are exhausted (the final allowed attempt still ends failed). Recipients, priority and channel mirror ingestion.failed_source_retry_blocked: active super_admin users plus workspace owner/admin members, priority important, in_app, anchor /ingestion-runs?run_id=<last failed run>. Metadata: run id chain, workspace_code, day_key, attempt, error_code.

notification_generation_rules_v1.reason: Lightweight feedback affects activity and scoring but should not create noisy per-user notifications.

recipients: existing visible commenters on the same daily_report_item except the actor
parent commenter for replies except the actor
active object watchers on the same daily_report_item except the actor and excluding users who already receive comment.mentioned for the same comment
active enabled members of the same workspace whose username, employee_no or external_id appears as @identifier in the comment body
workspace owner/admin members for the conflict workspace
workspace owner/admin members for the failed ingestion run workspace
notification_generation_rules_v1.idempotency_rule: One event is emitted per base ingestion run, event type and attempt_count. A blocked alert is emitted once when max attempts are reached.

recipients: active members of the same workspace except the actor
notification_generation_rules_v1.idempotency_rule: Publishing an already published report updates published_at but does not emit another publish notification.

recipients: active members of the same workspace except the actor
active object watchers on the weekly_report_item except the actor
notification_generation_rules_v1.idempotency_rule: A PATCH with no effective editor snapshot changes does not emit weekly_report_item.updated.

recipients: active object watchers on the dedupe_group except the actor
notification_generation_rules_v1.idempotency_rule: Candidate-pool bulk adopt/reject only emits this event when a daily_report_item is created or its adoption_status changes.

recipients: the active assignee when the assignee is an enabled member of the same workspace
notification_generation_rules_v1.validation_rule: Topic task create/update rejects assignee_user_id when the user is not an active enabled member of the task workspace.

recipients: the active owner_user_id when the owner is an enabled member of the same workspace
excluding status changes made by the owner
notification_generation_rules_v1.validation_rule: Requirement create/update rejects owner_user_id when the user is not an active enabled member of the requirement workspace.

preference_filtering_v1.rule: Before creating a Notification row, the backend checks notification_preferences for the recipient, workspace_code and event_type; in_app_enabled=false suppresses only future notifications of that event type.

sync_boundary_v1.rule: Collaboration and notification objects are local user/workspace state in v1. They must not be listed by extranet feed manifest and direct GET /api/sync/feed requests for them must return 400, even if an activity event row is marked sync_allowed.

object_watchers.permission: workspace viewer+ for the target object workspace
workspace viewer+ for the target object workspace

notifications.status_rule: status=all returns active inbox notifications and excludes archived rows; status=archived lists archived notifications.

notifications.status_transition: unread/read -> archived; unread archived notifications no longer count as unread

target_resolution_v1.rule: The backend resolves notification target_label and target_path from activity_event object_type, target_object_type and metadata_json. The frontend message page must render these fields instead of guessing route queries locally.

v1_capabilities: list unread/read/archived/all-active notifications
show unread count
mark one notification read
mark all unread notifications read
archive one notification and remove it from unread/read/all-active lists
link daily report item notifications to /daily-reports?item_id={id}
include comment_id query when the notification event object is a comment and highlight the matching comment in DailyReportsPage
show comment.mentioned as a configurable in-app preference labeled as a mention notification
link daily report publish notifications to /daily-reports?report_id={id}
link weekly report publish notifications to /weekly-reports?report_id={id}
link weekly report item notifications to /weekly-reports?item_id={id}
generate weekly_report_item.updated in-app notifications from weekly report item PATCH changes
link sync conflict notifications to /sync?conflict_id={id} and highlight the matching conflict row
link failed-source retry due/blocked notifications to /ingestion-runs?run_id={id} and select the matching ingestion run
link task assignment notifications to /tasks?task_id={id} and highlight the matching task row
link requirement status notifications to /requirements?requirement_id={id} and highlight the matching requirement row
show daily report item watcher state in the detail drawer and PATCH /api/object-watchers when users follow/unfollow an item
show weekly report item watcher state in the item action row and PATCH /api/object-watchers when users follow/unfollow an item
show dedupe group watcher state in the candidate details panel and PATCH /api/object-watchers when users follow/unfollow a candidate
link dedupe_group.adoption_changed notifications to /news?dedupe_group_id={id} and highlight the matching candidate
show current-workspace in-app notification preference switches
PATCH preference changes and state that they affect future notifications only
